seoTitle: Upper Dawson vs Upper Flagstone — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Dawson and Upper Flagstone. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Dawson vs Upper Flagstone: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Dawson and Upper Flagstone.
heading: Upper Dawson vs Upper Flagstone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Dawson, Queensland and Upper Flagstone, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Dawson has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Upper Flagstone (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Dawson or Upper Flagstone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Dawson has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Upper Flagstone scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Dawson scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Flagstone scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Dawson or Upper Flagstone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Dawson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
